integrity.description: The agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to make changes rather than using direct database modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, filling out forms, and clicking save/submit buttons.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Snipe-IT application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine Snipe-IT asset management system, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or terminal script output.

integrity.description: The agent did not run pre-written scripts in the terminal to bypass the manual GUI steps.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal (if visible) should not show the execution of SQL commands, cURL requests, or automated scripts directly inserting the required data.
